revision.text:
{{#ifeq: {{{yearparamcheck|}}}|OK|[[Category:Template Year in country category with year parameter]]}}{{#ifeq: {{{nocat|}}}|yes|[[Category:Template Year in country category with nocat]]}}{{#ifeq: {{{nocountrycentury|}}}|yes|[[Category:Template Year in country category with nocountrycentury]]}}{{#if: {{{newname|}}}|{{#ifeq: {{{newnamestartcheck|}}}|OK|[[Category:Template Year in country category with newname parameter]]|{{Error|[[Template:Year in county category]] has been used with the "newname" parameter, to indicate that the county later adopted a new name.
However the accompanying "newnamestart" parameter is either missing or is not a valid 3-or 4-digit year.
The "newname" parameter will therefore be ignored.}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]}}|{{#if: {{{newnamestart|}}}|{{Error|[[Template:Year in county category]] has been used with the "newnamestart" parameter, to indicate the year when the county later adopted a new name.
However the accompanying "newname" parameter missing, so the template doesn't know what the newname is.
The "newnamestart" parameter will therefore be ignored.}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]|}}}}{{Year in country category/inner core|year={{#ifeq: {{{yearparamcheck|}}}|OK|{{{yearparam|}}}|{{{calcyear|}}}}}|country = {{{country|}}}|prefix = {{{prefix|}}}|countrydab = {{{countrydab|}}}|continent1 = {{{continent1|}}}|continent2 = {{{continent2|}}}|continent3 = {{{continent3|}}}|continent4 = {{{continent4|}}}|newname={{#ifeq: {{{newnamestartcheck|}}}|OK|{{{newname|}}}}}|newnamestart={{#ifeq: {{{newnamestartcheck|}}}|OK|{{{newnamestart|}}}|-99999}}|nocat={{{nocat|}}}|min={{{min|}}}|max={{{max|}}}|nocountrycentury={{{nocountrycentury|}}}|subcountry={{{subcountry|}}}}}{{Documentation|content={{High-use}}This is a sub-template of [[Template:{{ROOTPAGENAME}}]]}}

{{#ifeq: {{{yearparamcheck|}}}|OK|[[Category:Template Year in country category with year parameter]]}}{{#ifeq: {{{nocat|}}}|yes|[[Category:Template Year in country category with nocat]]}}{{#ifeq: {{{nocountrycentury|}}}|yes|[[Category:Template Year in country category with nocountrycentury]]}}{{#if: {{{newname|}}}|{{#ifeq: {{{newnamestartcheck|}}}|OK|[[Category:Template Year in country category with newname parameter]]|{{Error|[[Template:Year in county category]] has been used with the "newname" parameter, to indicate that the county later adopted a new name.
However the accompanying "newnamestart" parameter is either missing or is not a valid 3-or 4-digit year.
The "newname" parameter will therefore be ignored.}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]}}|{{#if: {{{newnamestart|}}}|{{Error|[[Template:Year in county category]] has been used with the "newnamestart" parameter, to indicate the year when the county later adopted a new name.
However the accompanying "newname" parameter missing, so the template doesn't know what the newname is.
The "newnamestart" parameter will therefore be ignored.}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]|}}}}{{Year in country category/inner core|year={{#ifeq: {{{yearparamcheck|}}}|OK|{{{yearparam|}}}|{{{calcyear|}}}}}|country = {{{country|}}}|prefix = {{{prefix|}}}|countrydab = {{{countrydab|}}}|continent1 = {{{continent1|}}}|continent2 = {{{continent2|}}}|continent3 = {{{continent3|}}}|continent4 = {{{continent4|}}}|newname={{#ifeq: {{{newnamestartcheck|}}}|OK|{{{newname|}}}}}|newnamestart={{#ifeq: {{{newnamestartcheck|}}}|OK|{{{newnamestart|}}}|-99999}}|nocat={{{nocat|}}}|min={{{min|}}}|max={{{max|}}}|nocountrycentury={{{nocountrycentury|}}}|subcountry={{{subcountry|}}}}}{{Documentation|content={{High-use}}This is a sub-template of [[Template:{{ROOTPAGENAME}}]]}}

{{#ifeq: {{{yearparamcheck|}}}|OK|[[Category: Year in country category with year parameter]]}}{{#ifeq: {{{nocat|}}}|yes|[[Category: Year in country category with nocat]]}}{{#ifeq: {{{nocountrycentury|}}}|yes|[[Category: Year in country category with nocountrycentury]]}}{{#if: {{{newname|}}}|{{#ifeq: {{{newnamestartcheck|}}}|OK|[[Category: Year in country category with newname parameter]]|{{Error|[[Template:Year in county category]] has been used with the "newname" parameter, to indicate that the county later adopted a new name.
However the accompanying "newnamestart" parameter is either missing or is not a valid 3-or 4-digit year.
The "newname" parameter will therefore be ignored.}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]}}|{{#if: {{{newnamestart|}}}|{{Error|[[Template:Year in county category]] has been used with the "newnamestart" parameter, to indicate the year when the county later adopted a new name.
However the accompanying "newname" parameter missing, so the template doesn't know what the newname is.
The "newnamestart" parameter will therefore be ignored.}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]|}}}}{{Year in country category/inner core|year={{#ifeq: {{{yearparamcheck|}}}|OK|{{{yearparam|}}}|{{{calcyear|}}}}}|country = {{{country|}}}|prefix = {{{prefix|}}}|countrydab = {{{countrydab|}}}|continent1 = {{{continent1|}}}|continent2 = {{{continent2|}}}|continent3 = {{{continent3|}}}|continent4 = {{{continent4|}}}|newname={{#ifeq: {{{newnamestartcheck|}}}|OK|{{{newname|}}}}}|newnamestart={{#ifeq: {{{newnamestartcheck|}}}|OK|{{{newnamestart|}}}|-99999}}|nocat={{{nocat|}}}|min={{{min|}}}|max={{{max|}}}|nocountrycentury={{{nocountrycentury|}}}|subcountry={{{subcountry|}}}}}{{Documentation|content={{High-use}}This is a sub-template of [[Template:{{ROOTPAGENAME}}]]}}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{#ifeq: {{{yearparamcheck|}}}|OK|[[Category: Year in country category with year parameter]]}}{{#ifeq: {{{nocat|}}}|yes|[[Category: Year in country category with nocat]]}}{{#ifeq: {{{nocountrycentury|}}}|yes|[[Category: Year in country category with nocountrycentury]]}}{{#if: {{{newname|}}}|{{#ifeq: {{{newnamestartcheck|}}}|OK|[[Category: Year in country category with newname parameter]]|{{Error|[[Template:Year in county category]] has been used with the "newname" parameter, to indicate that the county later adopted a new name.
However the accompanying "newnamestart" parameter is either missing or is not a valid 3-or 4-digit year.
The "newname" parameter will therefore be ignored.}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]}}|{{#if: {{{newnamestart|}}}|{{Error|[[Template:Year in county category]] has been used with the "newnamestart" parameter, to indicate the year when the county later adopted a new name.
However the accompanying "newname" parameter missing, so the template doesn't know what the newname is.
The "newnamestart" parameter will therefore be ignored.}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]|}}}}{{Year in country category/inner core|year={{#ifeq: {{{yearparamcheck|}}}|OK|{{{yearparam|}}}|{{{calcyear|}}}}}|country = {{{country|}}}|prefix = {{{prefix|}}}|countrydab = {{{countrydab|}}}|continent1 = {{{continent1|}}}|continent2 = {{{continent2|}}}|continent3 = {{{continent3|}}}|continent4 = {{{continent4|}}}|newname={{#ifeq: {{{newnamestartcheck|}}}|OK|{{{newname|}}}}}|newnamestart={{#ifeq: {{{newnamestartcheck|}}}|OK|{{{newnamestart|}}}|-99999}}|nocat={{{nocat|}}}|min={{{min|}}}|max={{{max|}}}|nocountrycentury={{{nocountrycentury|}}}|subcountry={{{subcountry|}}}}}{{Documentation|content={{High-use}}This is a sub-template of [[Template:{{ROOTPAGENAME}}]]}} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

{{#ifeq: {{{yearparamcheck|}}}|OK|[[Category: Year in country category with year parameter]]}}{{#ifeq: {{{nocat|}}}|yes|[[Category: Year in country category with nocat]]}}{{#ifeq: {{{nocountrycentury|}}}|yes|[[Category: Year in country category with nocountrycentury]]}}{{#if: {{{newname|}}}|{{#ifeq: {{{newnamestartcheck|}}}|OK|[[Category: Year in country category with newname parameter]]|{{Error|[[Template:Year in county category]] has been used with the "newname" parameter, to indicate that the county later adopted a new name.
However the accompanying "newnamestart" parameter is either missing or is not a valid 3-or 4-digit year.
The "newname" parameter will therefore be ignored.}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]}}|{{#if: {{{newnamestart|}}}|{{Error|[[Template:Year in county category]] has been used with the "newnamestart" parameter, to indicate the year when the county later adopted a new name.
However the accompanying "newname" parameter missing, so the template doesn't know what the newname is.
The "newnamestart" parameter will therefore be ignored.}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]|}}}}{{Year in country category/inner core|year={{#ifeq: {{{yearparamcheck|}}}|OK|{{{yearparam|}}}|{{{calcyear|}}}}}|country = {{{country|}}}|prefix = {{{prefix|}}}|countrydab = {{{countrydab|}}}|continent1 = {{{continent1|}}}|continent2 = {{{continent2|}}}|continent3 = {{{continent3|}}}|continent4 = {{{continent4|}}}|newname={{#ifeq: {{{newnamestartcheck|}}}|OK|{{{newname|}}}}}|newnamestart={{#ifeq: {{{newnamestartcheck|}}}|OK|{{{newnamestart|}}}|-99999}}|nocat={{{nocat|}}}|min={{{min|}}}|max={{{max|}}}|nocountrycentury={{{nocountrycentury|}}}|subcountry={{{subcountry|}}}}}{{Documentation|content={{High-use}}This is a sub-template of [[Template:{{ROOTPAGENAME}}]]}}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
revision.text:
{{#ifeq: {{{yearparamcheck|}}}|OK|[[Category: Year in country category with year parameter]]}}{{#ifeq: {{{nocat|}}}|yes|[[Category: Year in country category with nocat]]}}{{#ifeq: {{{nocountrycentury|}}}|yes|[[Category: Year in country category with nocountrycentury]]}}{{#if: {{{newname|}}}|{{#ifeq: {{{newnamestartcheck|}}}|OK|[[Category: Year in country category with newname parameter]]|{{Error|[[Template:Year in county category]] has been used with the "newname" parameter, to indicate that the county later adopted a new name.
However the accompanying "newnamestart" parameter is either missing or is not a valid 3-or 4-digit year.
The "newname" parameter will therefore be ignored.}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]}}|{{#if: {{{newnamestart|}}}|{{Error|[[Template:Year in county category]] has been used with the "newnamestart" parameter, to indicate the year when the county later adopted a new name.
However the accompanying "newname" parameter missing, so the template doesn't know what the newname is.
The "newnamestart" parameter will therefore be ignored.}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]|}}}}{{Year in country category/inner core|year={{#ifeq: {{{yearparamcheck|}}}|OK|{{{yearparam|}}}|{{{calcyear|}}}}}|country = {{{country|}}}|prefix = {{{prefix|}}}|countrydab = {{{countrydab|}}}|continent1 = {{{continent1|}}}|continent2 = {{{continent2|}}}|continent3 = {{{continent3|}}}|continent4 = {{{continent4|}}}|newname={{#ifeq: {{{newnamestartcheck|}}}|OK|{{{newname|}}}}}|newnamestart={{#ifeq: {{{newnamestartcheck|}}}|OK|{{{newnamestart|}}}|-99999}}|nocat={{{nocat|}}}|min={{{min|}}}|max={{{max|}}}|nocountrycentury={{{nocountrycentury|}}}|subcountry={{{subcountry|}}}}}{{Documentation|content={{High-use}}This is a sub-template of [[Template:{{ROOTPAGENAME}}]]}}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{#ifeq: {{{yearparamcheck|}}}|OK|[[Category: Year in country category with year parameter]]}}{{#ifeq: {{{nocat|}}}|yes|[[Category: Year in country category with nocat]]}}{{#ifeq: {{{nocountrycentury|}}}|yes|[[Category: Year in country category with nocountrycentury]]}}{{#if: {{{newname|}}}|{{#ifeq: {{{newnamestartcheck|}}}|OK|[[Category: Year in country category with newname parameter]]|{{Error|[[Template:Year in county category]] has been used with the "newname" parameter, to indicate that the county later adopted a new name.
However the accompanying "newnamestart" parameter is either missing or is not a valid 3-or 4-digit year.
The "newname" parameter will therefore be ignored.}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]}}|{{#if: {{{newnamestart|}}}|{{Error|[[Template:Year in county category]] has been used with the "newnamestart" parameter, to indicate the year when the county later adopted a new name.
However the accompanying "newname" parameter missing, so the template doesn't know what the newname is.
The "newnamestart" parameter will therefore be ignored.}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]|}}}}{{Year in country category/inner core|year={{#ifeq: {{{yearparamcheck|}}}|OK|{{{yearparam|}}}|{{{calcyear|}}}}}|country = {{{country|}}}|prefix = {{{prefix|}}}|countrydab = {{{countrydab|}}}|continent1 = {{{continent1|}}}|continent2 = {{{continent2|}}}|continent3 = {{{continent3|}}}|continent4 = {{{continent4|}}}|newname={{#ifeq: {{{newnamestartcheck|}}}|OK|{{{newname|}}}}}|newnamestart={{#ifeq: {{{newnamestartcheck|}}}|OK|{{{newnamestart|}}}|-99999}}|nocat={{{nocat|}}}|min={{{min|}}}|max={{{max|}}}|nocountrycentury={{{nocountrycentury|}}}|subcountry={{{subcountry|}}}}}{{Documentation|content={{High-use}}This is a sub-template of [[Template:{{ROOTPAGENAME}}]]}} [[Category:Templates]]

{{#ifeq: {{{yearparamcheck|}}}|OK|[[Category:Template Year in country category with year parameter]]}}{{#ifeq: {{{nocat|}}}|yes|[[Category:Template Year in country category with nocat]]}}{{#ifeq: {{{nocountrycentury|}}}|yes|[[Category:Template Year in country category with nocountrycentury]]}}{{#if: {{{newname|}}}|{{#ifeq: {{{newnamestartcheck|}}}|OK|[[Category:Template Year in country category with newname parameter]]|{{Error|[[Template:Year in county category]] has been used with the "newname" parameter, to indicate that the county later adopted a new name.
However the accompanying "newnamestart" parameter is either missing or is not a valid 3-or 4-digit year.
The "newname" parameter will therefore be ignored.}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]}}|{{#if: {{{newnamestart|}}}|{{Error|[[Template:Year in county category]] has been used with the "newnamestart" parameter, to indicate the year when the county later adopted a new name.
However the accompanying "newname" parameter missing, so the template doesn't know what the newname is.
The "newnamestart" parameter will therefore be ignored.}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]|}}}}{{Year in country category/inner core|year={{#ifeq: {{{yearparamcheck|}}}|OK|{{{yearparam|}}}|{{{calcyear|}}}}}|country = {{{country|}}}|prefix = {{{prefix|}}}|countrydab = {{{countrydab|}}}|continent1 = {{{continent1|}}}|continent2 = {{{continent2|}}}|continent3 = {{{continent3|}}}|continent4 = {{{continent4|}}}|newname={{#ifeq: {{{newnamestartcheck|}}}|OK|{{{newname|}}}}}|newnamestart={{#ifeq: {{{newnamestartcheck|}}}|OK|{{{newnamestart|}}}|-99999}}|nocat={{{nocat|}}}|min={{{min|}}}|max={{{max|}}}|nocountrycentury={{{nocountrycentury|}}}|subcountry={{{subcountry|}}}}}{{Documentation|content={{High-use}}This is a sub-template of [[Template:{{ROOTPAGENAME}}]]}}

{{#ifeq: {{{yearparamcheck|}}}|OK|[[Category:Template Year in country category with year parameter]]}}{{#ifeq: {{{nocat|}}}|yes|[[Category:Template Year in country category with nocat]]}}{{#ifeq: {{{nocountrycentury|}}}|yes|[[Category:Template Year in country category with nocountrycentury]]}}{{#if: {{{newname|}}}|{{#ifeq: {{{newnamestartcheck|}}}|OK|[[Category:Template Year in country category with newname parameter]]|{{Error|[[Template:Year in county category]] has been used with the "newname" parameter, to indicate that the county later adopted a new name.
However the accompanying "newnamestart" parameter is either missing or is not a valid 3-or 4-digit year.
The "newname" parameter will therefore be ignored.}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]}}|{{#if: {{{newnamestart|}}}|{{Error|[[Template:Year in county category]] has been used with the "newnamestart" parameter, to indicate the year when the county later adopted a new name.
However the accompanying "newname" parameter missing, so the template doesn't know what the newname is.
The "newnamestart" parameter will therefore be ignored.}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]|}}}}{{Year in country category/inner core|year={{#ifeq: {{{yearparamcheck|}}}|OK|{{{yearparam|}}}|{{{calcyear|}}}}}|country = {{{country|}}}|prefix = {{{prefix|}}}|countrydab = {{{countrydab|}}}|continent1 = {{{continent1|}}}|continent2 = {{{continent2|}}}|continent3 = {{{continent3|}}}|continent4 = {{{continent4|}}}|newname={{#ifeq: {{{newnamestartcheck|}}}|OK|{{{newname|}}}}}|newnamestart={{#ifeq: {{{newnamestartcheck|}}}|OK|{{{newnamestart|}}}|-99999}}|nocat={{{nocat|}}}|min={{{min|}}}|max={{{max|}}}|nocountrycentury={{{nocountrycentury|}}}|subcountry={{{subcountry|}}}}}{{Documentation|content={{High-use}}This is a sub-template of [[Template:{{ROOTPAGENAME}}]]}}

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 6 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23694499169|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{#ifeq: {{{yearparamcheck|}}}|OK|}}{{#ifeq: {{{nocat|}}}|yes|}}{{#ifeq: {{{nocountrycentury|}}}|yes|}}{{#if: {{{newname|}}}|{{#ifeq: {{{newnamestartcheck|}}}|OK||{{Error|[[Template:Year in county category]] has been used with the "newname" parameter, to indicate that the county later adopted a new name.
However the accompanying "newnamestart" parameter is either missing or is not a valid 3-or 4-digit year.
The "newname" parameter will therefore be ignored.}}}}|{{#if: {{{newnamestart|}}}|{{Error|[[Template:Year in county category]] has been used with the "newnamestart" parameter, to indicate the year when the county later adopted a new name.
However the accompanying "newname" parameter missing, so the template doesn't know what the newname is.
The "newnamestart" parameter will therefore be ignored.}}|}}}}{{Year in country category/inner core|year={{#ifeq: {{{yearparamcheck|}}}|OK|{{{yearparam|}}}|{{{calcyear|}}}}}|country = {{{country|}}}|prefix = {{{prefix|}}}|countrydab = {{{countrydab|}}}|continent1 = {{{continent1|}}}|continent2 = {{{continent2|}}}|continent3 = {{{continent3|}}}|continent4 = {{{continent4|}}}|newname={{#ifeq: {{{newnamestartcheck|}}}|OK|{{{newname|}}}}}|newnamestart={{#ifeq: {{{newnamestartcheck|}}}|OK|{{{newnamestart|}}}|-99999}}|nocat={{{nocat|}}}|min={{{min|}}}|max={{{max|}}}|nocountrycentury={{{nocountrycentury|}}}|subcountry={{{subcountry|}}}}}{{Documentation|content={{High-use}}This is a sub-template of [[Template:{{ROOTPAGENAME}}]]}} [[Category:Template Year in country category with year parameter]] [[Category:Template Year in country category with nocat]] [[Category:Template Year in country category with nocountrycentury]] [[Category:Template Year in country category with newname parameter]] [[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]] [[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

{{#ifeq: {{{yearparamcheck|}}}|OK|}}{{#ifeq: {{{nocat|}}}|yes|}}{{#ifeq: {{{nocountrycentury|}}}|yes|}}{{#if: {{{newname|}}}|{{#ifeq: {{{newnamestartcheck|}}}|OK||{{Error|[[Template:Year in county category]] has been used with the "newname" parameter, to indicate that the county later adopted a new name.
However the accompanying "newnamestart" parameter is either missing or is not a valid 3-or 4-digit year.
The "newname" parameter will therefore be ignored.}}}}|{{#if: {{{newnamestart|}}}|{{Error|[[Template:Year in county category]] has been used with the "newnamestart" parameter, to indicate the year when the county later adopted a new name.
However the accompanying "newname" parameter missing, so the template doesn't know what the newname is.
The "newnamestart" parameter will therefore be ignored.}}|}}}}{{Year in country category/inner core|year={{#ifeq: {{{yearparamcheck|}}}|OK|{{{yearparam|}}}|{{{calcyear|}}}}}|country = {{{country|}}}|prefix = {{{prefix|}}}|countrydab = {{{countrydab|}}}|continent1 = {{{continent1|}}}|continent2 = {{{continent2|}}}|continent3 = {{{continent3|}}}|continent4 = {{{continent4|}}}|newname={{#ifeq: {{{newnamestartcheck|}}}|OK|{{{newname|}}}}}|newnamestart={{#ifeq: {{{newnamestartcheck|}}}|OK|{{{newnamestart|}}}|-99999}}|nocat={{{nocat|}}}|min={{{min|}}}|max={{{max|}}}|nocountrycentury={{{nocountrycentury|}}}|subcountry={{{subcountry|}}}}}{{Documentation|content={{High-use}}This is a sub-template of [[Template:{{ROOTPAGENAME}}]]}} [[Category:Template Year in country category with year parameter]] [[Category:Template Year in country category with nocat]] [[Category:Template Year in country category with nocountrycentury]] [[Category:Template Year in country category with newname parameter]] [[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]] [[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/25015587690|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{#ifeq: {{{yearparamcheck|}}}|OK|}}{{#ifeq: {{{nocat|}}}|yes|}}{{#ifeq: {{{nocountrycentury|}}}|yes|}}{{#if: {{{newname|}}}|{{#ifeq: {{{newnamestartcheck|}}}|OK||{{Error|[[Template:Year in county category]] has been used with the "newname" parameter, to indicate that the county later adopted a new name.
However the accompanying "newnamestart" parameter is either missing or is not a valid 3-or 4-digit year.
The "newname" parameter will therefore be ignored.}}}}|{{#if: {{{newnamestart|}}}|{{Error|[[Template:Year in county category]] has been used with the "newnamestart" parameter, to indicate the year when the county later adopted a new name.
However the accompanying "newname" parameter missing, so the template doesn't know what the newname is.
The "newnamestart" parameter will therefore be ignored.}}|}}}}{{Year in country category/inner core|year={{#ifeq: {{{yearparamcheck|}}}|OK|{{{yearparam|}}}|{{{calcyear|}}}}}|country = {{{country|}}}|prefix = {{{prefix|}}}|countrydab = {{{countrydab|}}}|continent1 = {{{continent1|}}}|continent2 = {{{continent2|}}}|continent3 = {{{continent3|}}}|continent4 = {{{continent4|}}}|newname={{#ifeq: {{{newnamestartcheck|}}}|OK|{{{newname|}}}}}|newnamestart={{#ifeq: {{{newnamestartcheck|}}}|OK|{{{newnamestart|}}}|-99999}}|nocat={{{nocat|}}}|min={{{min|}}}|max={{{max|}}}|nocountrycentury={{{nocountrycentury|}}}|subcountry={{{subcountry|}}}}}{{Documentation|content={{High-use}}This is a sub-template of [[Template:{{ROOTPAGENAME}}]]}} [[Category:Template Year in country category with year parameter]] [[Category:Template Year in country category with nocat]] [[Category:Template Year in country category with nocountrycentury]] [[Category:Template Year in country category with newname parameter]] [[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]] [[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
